title: Elizabeth Warren Claims Crypto Bank Charters for Coinbase, Ripple Violate Law
summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren argues that nine crypto firms, including Coinbase and Ripple, were improperly granted national trust bank charters. She claims the approvals violate the National Bank Act and calls for a review.
body:
Senator Elizabeth Warren has accused the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) of illegally approving national trust bank charters for nine crypto firms, including major players like Coinbase and Ripple. In a letter to the Comptroller, Warren argued that these approvals violate the National Bank Act, which governs the granting of bank charters.

Warren specifically highlighted that the OCC approved these charters without proper oversight, potentially exposing the financial system to undue risks. She called for an immediate review of these approvals and requested detailed information on the criteria used to grant them. The senator has been a vocal critic of the crypto industry, often citing concerns about consumer protection and financial stability.

This development could have significant implications for crypto firms operating under these charters. If Warren's claims are upheld, it could lead to the revocation of these charters, forcing companies like Coinbase and Ripple to seek alternative regulatory pathways. This could also set a precedent for future crypto-related banking applications, making the approval process more stringent.

For everyday users, this news underscores the regulatory uncertainties surrounding the crypto industry. If these charters are revoked, it could impact the services offered by these firms, potentially leading to disruptions in banking and financial services. Users should stay informed about any regulatory changes that might affect their ability to use these platforms.

Moving forward, watch for any responses from the OCC or the affected crypto firms. The outcome of this review could shape the future of crypto banking and set important precedents for regulatory oversight. Users should also keep an eye on any legislative actions that might follow from Warren's letter.
twitterThread: Senator Elizabeth Warren says national trust bank charters for Coinbase, Ripple, and seven other crypto firms were approved illegally. She claims they violate the National Bank Act.
Warren argues the OCC approved these charters without proper oversight, potentially exposing the financial system to risks. She's calling for an immediate review.

If these charters are revoked, it could disrupt services for users. Watch for responses from the OCC or affected firms. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-19-elizabeth-warren-claims-crypto-bank-charters-for-coinbase-ripple-violate-law
